subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted unto God! I beseech the True One that He may raise thee to such a state that thou mayest be restless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب الی الله از حق میطلبم که تو را بحالتی مبعوث نماید که بیقرار باشی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
